heading: Use of Federal facilities and assistance
label: 41764 Use of Federal facilities and assistance
notes: Effective DateSection applicable only to fiscal years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2000 Amendments note under .Sept. 30, 1999section 3 of Pub. L. 106–181section 106 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable only to fiscal years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2000 Amendments note under .Sept. 30, 1999section 3 of Pub. L. 106–181section 106 of this title

children.text: with the consent of the appropriate Federal officials; and

children.heading: .—Assistance
children.label: b .—Assistance
children.text: The head of each appropriate department or agency of the United States Government shall exercise the duties and powers of that head in such manner as to assist in carrying out the policy specified in section 41761.

children.heading: .—Oversight
children.label: c .—Oversight
children.text: The Secretary shall make available to the Comptroller General of the United States such information with respect to any Federal credit instrument made under this subchapter as the Comptroller General may require to carry out the duties of the Comptroller General under chapter 7 of title 31, United States Code.
